title: Fiddler AI Observability and Security
description: Fiddler AI Observability and Security serves as the Control Plane for compound AI and agentic systems. The platform provides standardized telemetry, continuous evaluation, real-time guardrails, enforceable policy, and auditable governance across the full AI lifecycle. Fiddler's built-in Trust Models enable organizations to evaluate every AI interaction for safety, accuracy, and compliance without relying on external LLM API calls.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for Agentic Apps 2026
